Bash(git -c user.email="dev@roomfinderai.com" -c user.name="RoomFinder Dev" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''

Bash(git -c user.email="dev@roomfinderai.com" -c user.name="RoomFinder Dev" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Simplify housing journey section for better user experience

- Updated headline to "Find Your Perfect Home in 5 Easy Steps"
- Made step titles more conversational and user-friendly
- Added time estimates and benefit-focused descriptions
- Streamlined call-to-action with single primary button
- Enhanced visual elements including celebration emoji for final step
- Removed confusing multiple buttons for cleaner interface
- Made language more approachable and less corporate

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -c user.email="dev@roomfinderai.com" -c user.name="RoomFinder Dev" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement fully navigatable 5-step housing journey

- Add missing step sections for roommate matching, safety, and move-in
- Enhance goToStep() function with visual state management
- Add dynamic progress tracking with completed/active/pending states  
- Implement Previous/Next navigation buttons in all step sections
- Add comprehensive CSS styles for enhanced user experience
- Include auto-initialization for seamless navigation flow
- Make housing journey fully responsive and user-friendly

All 5 steps now work perfectly with smooth scrolling, visual feedback,
and intuitive navigation between sections.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
